_comment: HME RAG configuration. Fields: ragIndexDirs (explicit allowlist, ONLY these dirs are indexed), ragIgnore (pathspec glob list for path-specific exclusions like doc/theory/**), ragLibs (external library configs). Basename exclusions → HME_IGNORE_DIRS in .env. File exclusions → HME_IGNORE_FILES in .env. Size limit → HME_RAG_MAX_FILE_SIZE_KB in .env.
